title: Thirumalapadi Siva Temple
tagline: Thirumalapadi Siva Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirumazhapadi Vaidyanathaswami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thirumazhapadi in Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Thirumazhapadi Vaidyanathaswami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thirumazhapadi in Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vaidyanathaswami. His consort, Parvati, is known as Sundarambikai. The historical name of the place is Mazhuvadi.

topPlaces.name: Akasapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Akasapureeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple at Kaduveli in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu state in India. The main deity in this temple is Akasapureeswarar and the goddess is Mangalambiga.

topPlaces.name: Achanoor
topPlaces.description: Achanoor is a village in Tamil Nadu, India, that lies between Thiruvaiyaru and Kallanai (Grand Anaicut). The main economic activity in the village is agriculture.

topPlaces.name: Pudukkottai Village
topPlaces.description: Pudukkottai is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It had a population of 1856 in 2001.

topPlaces.name: Perumpuliyur
topPlaces.description: Perumpuliyur is a village in the Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. The village is known for the Vyagrapureeswarar Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirumalapadi Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirumalapadi Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirumalapadi Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirumalapadi Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirumalapadi Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirumalapadi Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirumalapadi Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirumalapadi Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kandiratheertham, Akasapureeswarar Temple, Achanoor, Pudukkottai Village, Perumpuliyur.
